trades.reasoning: Score dropped to 40 with MACD below signal line — momentum has deteriorated; capturing the +4.3% gain and redeploying into score-95 setups is better risk management.
Score 95 with RSI 66.9 in the clean bullish momentum zone (not overbought), confirmed MACD crossover, and price 11% above SMA-20 — strongest technical setup on the screener today.
Score 95 with RSI 68.3, rising MACD histogram, and price above SMA-20 — clean momentum with room to run before overbought territory, fitting the risk-on tone.

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.4% and S&P 500 up 0.7%, giving a green light for momentum plays. I'm rotating out of SMCI — its momentum score has fallen to 40 and its MACD has turned bearish, making it the weakest link in the portfolio. Proceeds are redeployed into FLY and LUNR, the two highest-scoring (95) candidates with RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish zone rather than overbought territory.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted broad gains today with the NASDAQ leading at +1.4%, driven by renewed appetite for growth and technology stocks in a risk-on session. Sentiment was supported by easing macro anxiety and continued strength in AI-related hardware names, keeping momentum in high-beta sectors. The relative outperformance of NASDAQ over the S&P 500 signals that investors are rotating back into growth over value, a classic risk-on pattern.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日普遍上揚，那斯達克指數以+1.4%領漲，反映市場風險偏好回升，資金重新流入成長股與科技板塊。宏觀憂慮緩和加上AI硬體相關個股持續強勢，支撐市場情緒。那斯達克跑贏標普500的格局，是典型的「風險偏好開啟」訊號，顯示資金正從價值股轉向成長股配置。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: RSI (Relative Strength Index) measures how fast a stock is moving up or down on a scale of 0–100. An RSI between 55 and 70 is considered the 'bullish momentum zone' — the stock is trending up with conviction but hasn't yet become overbought (above 70), meaning there's still room to climb before a likely pullback. Today's top picks FLY and LUNR both sit in this sweet spot, which is why they rank above many other candidates with higher RSIs.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: RSI（相對強弱指數）以0到100的刻度衡量股價上漲或下跌的速度。RSI介於55至70之間，被視為「多頭動能區間」——股票正強勁上升，但尚未進入超買區（70以上），意味著仍有上升空間，未到拉回修正的臨界點。今日精選的FLY與LUNR均處於此甜蜜區間，這也是它們評分高於眾多RSI更高個股的關鍵原因。
